scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.test: concurrently -n backend,vitest -c blue,green "npm run test:backend" "npm run test:vitest"
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && uv run pytest -n auto
scripts.test:all: concurrently -n backend,vitest,playwright -c blue,green,yellow "npm run test:backend" "npm run test:vitest" "npm run test:playwright"
